jd_text: Company Description The company offers an all-in-one platform designed to help businesses efficiently manage essential operations such as payments, expenses, travel, and insurance. It provides tools to streamline and automate multiple processes, enabling operational excellence for its clients. Backed by the International Holding Company (IHC), the platform integrates innovation and reliability to deliver smart business solutions. Role Description This is a full-time, on-site role located in Dubai for a Chief of Staff. The Chief of Staff will support executive leadership in strategy development, decision-making, and the execution of key initiatives. Responsibilities include managing cross-functional projects, streamlining internal operations, and ensuring alignment across the leadership team. The role also involves acting as a trusted advisor, providing data-driven insights, and representing the executive team in high-level meetings and communications. Qualifications Strong leadership, strategic planning, and decision-making skills Proficiency in project management, process optimization, and operational planning Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to influence and collaborate with diverse stakeholders Analytical and problem-solving skills, with a data-driven approach to decision-making Ability to manage multiple priorities and maintain a high degree of organization Experience working in a fast-paced, high-growth environment is a plus Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Management, or a related field; MBA or similar advanced degree preferred Prior experience in a Chief of Staff role or a similar leadership support position is advantageous
